class PriorityQueue
  def initialize
    @heap = []
  end

  def push(element)
    @heap << element
    # bubble up
    idx = @heap.size - 1
    while idx > 0
      parent = (idx - 1) / 2
      if @heap[parent] > @heap[idx]
        @heap[parent], @heap[idx] = @heap[idx], @heap[parent]
        idx = parent
      else
        break
      end
    end
  end

  def pop
    if @heap.empty?
      return nil
    end
    # swap root with last element
    last = @heap.pop
    if @heap.empty?
      return last
    end
    @heap[0], last = last, @heap[0]
    # bubble down
    idx = 0
    while true
      left = 2 * idx + 1
      right = 2 * idx + 2
      smallest = idx
      if left < @heap.size && @heap[left] < @heap[smallest]
        smallest = left
      end
      if right < @heap.size && @heap[right] < @heap[smallest]
        smallest = right
      end
      if smallest == idx
        break
      end
      @heap[idx], @heap[smallest] = @heap[smallest], @heap[idx]
      idx = smallest
    end
    return @heap[0]
  end

  def peek
    @heap[0] if @heap.any?
  end
end

class PriorityQueue
  def initialize
    @heap = []
  end

  def push(element)
    @heap << element
    # bubble up
    idx = @heap.size - 1
    while idx > 0
      parent = (idx - 1) / 2
      if @heap[parent] > @heap[idx]
        @heap[parent], @heap[idx] = @heap[idx], @heap[parent]
        idx = parent
      else
        break
      end
    end
  end

  def pop
    if @heap.empty?
      return nil
    end
    # swap root with last element
    last = @heap.pop
    if @heap.empty?
      return last
    end
    @heap[0], last = last, @heap[0]
    # bubble down
    idx = 0
    while true
      left = 2 * idx + 1
      right = 2 * idx + 2
      smallest = idx
      if left < @heap.size && @heap[left] < @heap[smallest]
        smallest = left
      end
      if right < @heap.size && @heap[right] < @heap[smallest]
        smallest = right
      end
      if smallest == idx
        break
      end
      @heap[idx], @heap[smallest] = @heap[smallest], @heap[idx]
      idx = smallest
    end
    return @heap[0]
  end

  def peek
    @heap[0] if @heap.any?
  end
end

class PriorityQueue
  def initialize
    @heap = []
  end

  def push(element)
    @heap << element
    # bubble up
    idx = @heap.size - 1
    while idx > 0
      parent = (idx - 1) / 2
      if @heap[parent] > @heap[idx]
        @heap[parent], @heap[idx] = @heap[idx], @heap[parent]
        idx = parent
      else
        break
      end
    end
  end

  def pop
    if @heap.empty?
      return nil
    end
    # swap root with last element
    last = @heap.pop
    if @heap.empty?
      return last
    end
    @heap[0], last = last, @heap[0]
    # bubble down
    idx = 0
    while true
      left = 2 * idx + 1
      right = 2 * idx + 2
      smallest = idx
      if left < @heap.size && @heap[left] < @heap[smallest]
        smallest = left
      end
      if right < @heap.size && @heap[right] < @heap[smallest]
        smallest = right
      end
      if smallest == idx
        break
      end
      @heap[idx], @heap[smallest] = @heap[smallest], @heap[idx]
      idx = smallest
    end
    return @heap[0]
  end

  def peek
    @heap[0] if @heap.any?
  end
end

      parent = (idx - 1) / 2
      if @heap[parent] > @heap[idx]
        @heap[parent], @heap[idx] = @heap[idx], @heap[parent]
        idx = parent
      else
        break
      end
    end
  end

  def pop
    if @heap.empty?
      return nil
    end
    last = @heap.pop
    if @heap.empty?
      return last
    end
    @heap[0], last = last, @heap[0]
    idx = 0
    while true
      left = 2 * idx + 1
      right = 2 * idx + 2
      smallest = idx
      if left < @heap.size && @heap[left] < @heap[smallest]
        smallest = left
      end
      if right < @heap.size && @heap[right] < @heap[smallest]
        smallest = right
      end
      if smallest == idx
        break
      end
      @heap[idx], @heap[smallest] = @heap[smallest], @heap[idx]
      idx = smallest
    end
    return @heap[0]
  end

  def peek
    @heap[0] if @heap.any?
  end
end

def solve(grid, k)
  m = grid.size
  n = grid[0].size
  teleport_list = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n) { [] } }
  for i in 0...m
    for j in 0...n
      val = grid[i][j]
      for x in 0...m
        for y in 0...n
          if grid[x][y] <= val
            teleport_list[i][j] << [x, y]
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end

  dist = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n) { Array.new(k+1, Float::INFINITY) } }
  dist[0][0][0] = 0

  pq = PriorityQueue.new
  pq.push([0, 0, 0, 0])

  while !pq.empty?
    current = pq.pop
    cost, i, j, t = current
    if i == m-1 && j == n-1
      return cost
    end
    if cost > dist[i][j][t]
      next
    end

    # Regular moves
    if j+1 < n
      new_cost = cost + grid[i][j+1]
      if new_cost < dist[i][j+1][t]
        dist[i][j+1][t] = new_cost
        pq.push([new_cost, i, j+1, t])
      end
    end
    if i+1 < m
      new_cost = cost + grid[i+1][j]
      if new_cost < dist[i+1][j][t]
        dist[i+1][j][t] = new_cost
        pq.push([new_cost, i+1, j, t])
      end
    end

    # Teleport moves
    if t < k
      teleport_list[i][j].each do |(x, y)|
        new_cost = cost
        if new_cost < dist[x][y][t+1]
          dist[x][y][t+1] = new_cost
          pq.push([new_cost, x, y, t+1])
        end
      end
    end
  end
  # If not found, return something, but according to problem statement, there is a path
  # So this should never happen
  0
end
